movie.actors: Bruce Willis, Billy Bob Thornton, Ben Affleck, Liv Tyler
movie.awards: Nominated for 4 Oscars. Another 15 wins & 35 nominations.
movie.plot: After discovering that an asteroid the size of Texas is going to impact Earth in less than a month, N.A.S.A. recruits a misfit team of deep core drillers to save the planet.
movie.title: Armageddon
movie.writer: Jonathan Hensleigh (screenplay), J.J. Abrams (screenplay), Tony Gilroy (adaptation), Shane Salerno (adaptation), Robert Roy Pool (story), Jonathan Hensleigh (story)
